title: Renders a Multilingual Quarto Book
text: goal babelquarto render Quarto multilingual book structured like rOpenSci dev guide: qmd present main language, language extension à la .es.qmd

title: Renders a Multilingual Quarto Book
text: can install development version babelquarto rOpenSci R-universe: GitHub :

title: Renders a Multilingual Quarto Book
text: Create starter/example book. end three books, cross-link left sidebar. Example. Note translate content! Translation tooling live babeldown.
code: parent_dir <- withr::local_tempdir() book_dir <- "blop" babelquarto::quarto_multilingual_book(parent_dir = parent_dir, book_dir = book_dir) readLines(file.path(parent_dir, book_dir, "_quarto.yml")) #>  [1] "project:"                          "  type: book"                      #>  [3] ""                                  "book:"                             #>  [5] "  title: \"blop\""                 "  author: \"Maëlle Salmon\""       #>  [7] "  date: \"7/13/2023\""             "  chapters:"                       #>  [9] "    - index.qmd"                   "    - intro.qmd"                   #> [11] "    - summary.qmd"                 "    - references.qmd"              #> [13] ""                                  "bibliography: references.bib"      #> [15] ""                                  "format:"                           #> [17] "  html:"                           "    theme: cosmo"                  #> [19] ""                                  "babelquarto:"                      #> [21] "  mainlanguage: 'en'"              "  languages: ['es', 'fr']"         #> [23] "title-es: title in es"             "title-fr: title in fr"             #> [25] "description-es: description in es" "description-fr: description in fr" #> [27] "author-es: author in es"           "author-fr: author in fr"           #> [29] "lang: en" fs::dir_tree(file.path(parent_dir, book_dir)) #> /tmp/Rtmp5thWaD/file52e23e5b1314/blop #> ├── _quarto.yml #> ├── cover.png #> ├── index.es.qmd #> ├── index.fr.qmd #> ├── index.qmd #> ├── intro.es.qmd #> ├── intro.fr.qmd #> ├── intro.qmd #> ├── references.bib #> ├── references.es.qmd #> ├── references.fr.qmd #> ├── references.qmd #> ├── summary.es.qmd #> ├── summary.fr.qmd #> └── summary.qmd babelquarto::render_book(file.path(parent_dir, book_dir))

title: Renders a Multilingual Quarto Book
text: book whose main language English… Register languages Quarto configuration, instance config file now looks like: qmd/Rmd files. bla.qmd translation Spanish live bla.es.qmd. See babeldown getting automated translation. parts. part title translation can stored _quarto.yml like : exist, babelquarto falls back part title main language. title, author, description. translation can stored _quarto.yml like (book list): fields exist, babelquarto falls back text main language.
code: parent_dir <- withr::local_tempdir() book_dir <- "babelbook" quarto_bin <- quarto::quarto_path() withr::with_dir(parent_dir, {   sys::exec_wait(     quarto_bin,     args = c("create-project", book_dir, "--type", "book")   ) }) #> [1] 0 book_path <- file.path(parent_dir, book_dir) babelquarto::register_main_language(main_language = "en", book_path = book_path) babelquarto::register_further_languages(further_languages = "es", book_path = book_path) project:   type: book  book:   title: "babelbook"   author: "Jane Doe"   date: "7/13/2023"   chapters:     - index.qmd     - intro.qmd     - summary.qmd     - references.qmd  bibliography: references.bib  format:   html:     theme: cosmo   pdf:     documentclass: scrreprt     babelquarto:   mainlanguage: 'en'   languages: ['es'] title-es: title in es description-es: description in es author-es: author in es lang: en - part: Building Your Package     part-es: Construyendo tu paquete     chapters:     - pkg_building.Rmd     - pkg_ci.Rmd     - pkg_security.Rmd book:   title: Cool book   author: Myself  title-es: Libro genial author-es: Yo misma

Create a starter/example quarto multilingual book — quarto_multilingual_book
code: quarto_multilingual_book(   parent_dir,   book_dir,   main_language = "en",   further_languages = c("es", "fr"),   register_languages = TRUE )

title: Create a starter/example quarto multilingual book — quarto_multilingual_book
text: parent_dir Folder create book folder. book_dir Book folder name. main_language Code main languages. further_languages Codes main languages. register_languages Whether register languages (logical).

text: babelquarto expects book folder qmd/Rmd present many languages needed, basename , .qmd extension main language, .es.qmd (using language code) language. also need register language configuration file:

title: Render a Quarto multilingual book — render_book
code: directory <- withr::local_tempdir() quarto_multilingual_book(parent_dir = directory, book_dir = "blop") #> Error in setwd(dir = new): cannot change working directory render_book(file.path(directory, "blop")) #> Warning: cannot open file '/tmp/RtmpjhCkKh/file31c5a80b8de/blop/_quarto.yml': No such file or directory #> Error in file(file, "rt", encoding = fileEncoding): cannot open the connection if (FALSE) { if (require("servr") && rlang::is_interactive()) {   servr::httw(file.path(directory, "blop", "_book")) } }
